title: The National Institutes of Technology, Science Education and Research Act, 2007
full_text: The National Institutes of Technology, Science Education and Research Act, 2007 राष्‍ट्रीय प्रौद्योगिकी, विज्ञान शिक्षा और अनुसंधान संस्‍थानअधिनियम, 2007 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200729 Act Number: 29 Enactment Date: 2007-06-05 Act Year: 2007 Short Title: The National Institutes of Technology, Science Education and Research Act, 2007 Hindi Title: राष्‍ट्रीय प्रौद्योगिकी, विज्ञान शिक्षा और अनुसंधान संस्‍थानअधिनियम, 2007 Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 15-08-2007 Notification: 15th August, 2007, vide notification No. S.O. 1384(E), dated 9th August, 2007, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
